message:
fix(security): constant-time comparison for API keys, bearer tokens, and signatures

middleware:
- Replace BTreeSet::contains() with ct_eq() (constant-time equality) for
  API key and bearer token validation, preventing timing side-channels that
  could leak key material through response latency variation
- RateLimiter: guard against NaN/Infinity token balance from elapsed time
  calculation (fail-closed: reset to 0.0 if not finite)

epoch_scoped_keys:
- Replace derived PartialEq on Signature with a manual implementation using
  ct_eq_bytes() for constant-time comparison, preventing timing attacks on
  signature verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
